---
title: "VisualisationPlotly"
author: "Ghassen Sultana"
date: "10 janvier 2019"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:


## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
terr = read.csv2(file = "globalterrorismdb_0617dist.csv",header = T,sep = ";" ,dec = ",",na.strings = "")
terr = terr[which(terr$iyear>=1997),]
# le choix de travailler avec des donnÃ©es qui date apres 1997 est que plusieurs feature manque avant cette date 
# comme Incident Summary,Doubt Terrorism Proper?+ Alternative Designation,Part of Multiple Incident,Related Incidents
# Unaffiliated Individual(s),Number of Perpetrators Captured,Claim of Responsibility? + Mode for Claim of Responsibility
# et SURTOUT MOTIVE (Je pense que cette feature est la plus importante pour le travail a venir elle va nous donner une idÃ©e
# sur la fenÃªtre qu'on va utiliser pour la suite du travail)

#bo


#Nombre d'attaque pour chaque annÃ©e
Nbr=rep(0,20)
NbrEchec=rep(0,20)
NbrSuccees=rep(0,20)
NbrMort=rep(0,20)
NbrMortUs=rep(0,20)
annee=seq(1997,2016,1)

for( i in seq(1,length(annee),1)){
  container = terr[which(terr$iyear==annee[i]),]
  Nbr[i]= nrow(container)
  NbrEchec[i]=nrow(container[which(container$success==0),])
  NbrSuccees[i]=nrow(container[which(container$success==1),])
  NbrMort[i]=sum(container$nkill,na.rm = T)
  NbrMortUs[i]=sum(container$nkillus,na.rm = T)
  
}

#Variation Nombre succÃ©e/Ã©chec par annÃ©e
data <- data.frame(annee, Nbr,NbrEchec,NbrSuccees,NbrMort,NbrMortUs)
library(plotly)
p <- plot_ly(data, x = ~annee, y = ~Nbr, type = 'scatter',name='total' ,mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~NbrEchec, name = 'Nombre d echec', mode = 'lines+markers') %>%
  add_trace(y = ~NbrSuccees, name = 'Nombre de réussite', mode = 'lines+markers')
p

p <- plot_ly(data, x = ~annee, y = ~NbrMort,name='Nbr Mort', type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~NbrMortUs, name = 'Nbr MortUs', mode = 'lines+markers')
p



Assassination = rep(0,20)
Hijacking = rep(0,20)
Kidnapping = rep(0,20)
BarricadeIncident = rep(0,20)
BombingExplosion = rep(0,20)
ArmedAssault = rep(0,20)
UnarmedAssault = rep(0,20)
FacilityInfrastructureAttack = rep(0,20)
Unknown = rep(0,20)

for( i in seq(1,length(annee),1)){
  container = terr[which(terr$iyear==annee[i]),]
  Assassination[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==1),])
  ArmedAssault[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==2),])
  BombingExplosion[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==3),])
  Hijacking[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==4),])
  BarricadeIncident[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==5),])
  Kidnapping[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==6),])
  FacilityInfrastructureAttack [i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==7),])
  UnarmedAssault[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==8),])
  Unknown[i]=nrow(container[which(container$attacktype1==9),])
  
}
data <- data.frame(annee, UnarmedAssault,BarricadeIncident,Hijacking,Kidnapping,Assassination,FacilityInfrastructureAttack,BombingExplosion,ArmedAssault)



p <- plot_ly(data, x = ~annee, y = ~BombingExplosion,name='Bombing', type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~UnarmedAssault, name = 'Unarmed assault', mode = 'lines+markers') %>%
  add_trace(y = ~BarricadeIncident, name = 'Barricade Incident', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Hijacking, name = 'Hijacking', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Kidnapping, name = 'Kidnapping', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Assassination, name = 'Assassination', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~FacilityInfrastructureAttack, name = 'Facility Infrastructure attack', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~ArmedAssault, name = 'ArmedAssault', mode = 'lines+markers')


p

groupe=levels(terr$gname)
groupe2=table(terr$gname)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)
groupe2[1:11]



cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2), groupe2)
data <- cont[2:11,c('Categorie', 'Freq')]
as.data.frame(data)
p <- plot_ly(data, labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq, type = 'pie',textposition = 'inside',
             textinfo = 'label+percent',
             hoverinfo = 'text') %>%
  layout(title = 'Top 10 des groupes qui fait des attaques',
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p


Isil = rep(0,20)
Taliban = rep(0,20)
Al_shabab = rep(0,20)
Boko_Haram = rep(0,20)
Comm_party = rep(0,20)
Irish_rep = rep(0,20)
for( i in seq(1,length(annee),1)){
  container = terr[which(terr$iyear==annee[i]),]
  Isil[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL)"),])
  Taliban[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Taliban"),])
  Al_shabab[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Al-Shabaab"),])
  Boko_Haram[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Boko Haram"),])
  Comm_party[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Communist Party of India - Maoist (CPI-Maoist)"),])
  Irish_rep[i]=nrow(container[which(container$gname=="Irish Republican Army (IRA)"),])
  
  }
p <- plot_ly(data, x = ~annee, y = ~Isil,name='Isil', type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Taliban, name = 'Taliban', mode = 'lines+markers') %>%
  add_trace(y = ~Al_shabab, name = 'Al_shabab', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Boko_Haram, name = 'Boko_Haram', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Comm_party, name = 'Comm_party', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(y = ~Irish_rep, name = 'Irish_rep', mode = 'lines+markers')

p

groupe2=table(terr$claimmode_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)
pie(groupe2)

cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2), groupe2)
data <- cont[2:11,c('Categorie', 'Freq')]


p <- plot_ly(data, labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq, type = 'pie',textposition = 'inside',
             textinfo = 'label+percent',
             insidetextfont = list(color = '#FFFFFF')
      ) %>%
  layout(title = 'Top 10 des groupes qui fait des attaques',
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p

groupe2=table(terr$country_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)

v <-rownames(groupe2[1:30])

require(dplyr) #data manipulation
require(tidyr) #data manipulation, wide to long format
require(ggplot2) #ggplot package for plotting

cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[1:32]), groupe2[1:32])

p <- cont %>%
  plot_ly(labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq) %>%
  add_pie(hole = 0.6) %>%
  layout(title = "pays touchés attaques",  showlegend = T,
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))



p

groupe2["Tunisia"]

#Cible prÃ©ferer des terroriste
groupe2=table(terr$targtype1_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)

cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[1:20]), groupe2[1:20])

p <- cont %>%
  plot_ly(labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq) %>%
  add_pie(hole = 0.6) %>%
  layout(title = "Cible préferer",  showlegend = T,
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p

groupe2=table(terr$targsubtype1_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)
cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[1:20]), groupe2[1:20])

p2 <- cont %>%
  plot_ly(labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq) %>%
  add_pie(hole = 0.8) %>%
  layout(title = "Cible préferer",  showlegend = T,
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))


p2

groupe2=table(terr$motive)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)

cont <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[8:25]), groupe2[8:25])

p2 <- cont %>%
  plot_ly(labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq) %>%
  add_pie(hole = 0.6) %>%
  layout(title = "motif de l'attaque",  showlegend = F,
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))


p2

Tunis = terr[which(terr$country_txt=="Tunisia"),]

groupe2=table(Tunis$attacktype1_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)
data <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[1:6]), groupe2[1:6])

p <- plot_ly(data, labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq, type = 'pie',textposition = 'inside',
             textinfo = 'label+percent',
             insidetextfont = list(color = '#FFFFFF'),
             hoverinfo = 'text',
             text = ~paste(Freq, ' nombre de fois')) %>%
  layout(title = 'Type d attaque en tunisie',
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p

groupe2=table(Tunis$gname)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)

data <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[2:10]), groupe2[2:10])

p <- plot_ly(data, labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq, type = 'pie',textposition = 'inside',
             textinfo = 'label+percent',
             insidetextfont = list(color = '#FFFFFF'),
             hoverinfo = 'text',
             text = ~paste(Freq, ' nombre de fois')) %>%
  layout(title = 'Type d attaque en tunisie',
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p

groupe2=table(Tunis$targtype1_txt)
groupe2=sort(groupe2,decreasing = T)

data <- data.frame("Categorie"=rownames(groupe2[2:10]), groupe2[2:10])

p <- plot_ly(data, labels = ~Categorie, values = ~Freq, type = 'pie',textposition = 'inside',
             textinfo = 'label+percent',
             insidetextfont = list(color = '#FFFFFF'),
             hoverinfo = 'text',
             text = ~paste(Freq, ' nombre de fois')) %>%
  layout(title = 'Type d attaque en tunisie',
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p

library("tm")
library("SnowballC")
library("wordcloud")
library("RColorBrewer")
 word = terr$addnotes
 word = na.omit(word)
 docs <- Corpus(VectorSource(word[1:3500]))
 toSpace <- content_transformer(function (x , pattern ) gsub(pattern, " ", x))
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "/")
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "@")
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "\\|")

 docs <- tm_map(docs, content_transformer(tolower))
 # Remove numbers
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removeNumbers)
 # Remove english common stopwords
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removeWords, stopwords("english"))
 # Remove your own stop word
 # specify your stopwords as a character vector
 # Remove punctuations
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removePunctuation)
 # Eliminate extra white spaces
 docs <- tm_map(docs, stripWhitespace)
 
 dtm <- TermDocumentMatrix(docs)
 m <- as.matrix(dtm)
 v <- sort(rowSums(m),decreasing=TRUE)
 d <- data.frame(word = names(v),freq=v)
 head(d, 100)
 
 set.seed(1234)
 wordcloud(words = d$word, freq = d$freq, min.freq = 1,
           max.words=500, random.order=FALSE, rot.per=0.15, 
           colors=brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
library("tm")
library("SnowballC")
library("wordcloud")
library("RColorBrewer")
 word = terr$addnotes
 word = na.omit(word)
 docs <- Corpus(VectorSource(word[1:3500]))
 toSpace <- content_transformer(function (x , pattern ) gsub(pattern, " ", x))
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "/")
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "@")
 docs <- tm_map(docs, toSpace, "\\|")

 docs <- tm_map(docs, content_transformer(tolower))
 # Remove numbers
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removeNumbers)
 # Remove english common stopwords
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removeWords, stopwords("english"))
 # Remove your own stop word
 # specify your stopwords as a character vector
 # Remove punctuations
 docs <- tm_map(docs, removePunctuation)
 # Eliminate extra white spaces
 docs <- tm_map(docs, stripWhitespace)
 
 dtm <- TermDocumentMatrix(docs)
 m <- as.matrix(dtm)
 v <- sort(rowSums(m),decreasing=TRUE)
 d <- data.frame(word = names(v),freq=v)
 head(d, 100)
 
 set.seed(1234)
 wordcloud(words = d$word, freq = d$freq, min.freq = 1,
           max.words=500, random.order=FALSE, rot.per=0.15, 
           colors=brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
  ```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
